content.rendered:
Non-Motorized Transport (NMT)

Representative Projects
  • Feasibility Study and Detailed Project Report for Cycle Track in the neighborhood of Madiwala Lake in Bengaluru
  • Detailed Project Report on Rent- A-Cycle Project- Public Bicycle Sharing Scheme for Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh
  • Preparation of Detailed Project Report and Bid Process Management for selection of Contractor for Development of Cycle Track and Pedestrian Walkway and Bid Process Management for selection of PMC for Development of Cycle Track and Pedestrian Walkway in Naya Raipur
  • NMT Master Plan for Kochi City
  • Preparation of DPR for Non-Motorized Transport (NMT) and integrated Public Transport (IPT) Plan for Vijayawada Metro Rail Project
  • Preparation of DPR including detailed design, estimation and project supervision – “Urban Transport, Green space and park project under AMRUT initiatives of Government of Kerala & Local Self Government, implemented by KMRL, in Kochi and Kozhikode municipal corporation- Footpaths/Walkway, sidewalks, foot over bridge and facilities for NMT, Multi-level parking, development of green space and parks”
  • Consultancy Services for Preparation of Multimodal Integration Plan Report includes Metro Feeder Connectivity, NMT Master Plan and Public Bicycle Sharing Scheme for 30 Pune Metro Rail Stations
